summary:
Claim: Fever and arthralgia are not typically associated with influenza.  
Evidence: - Influenza mainly presents with high fever and muscle aches (myalgia), not prominent joint pain. - Malaria, Lyme disease, and syphilis often include febrile episodes with significant arthralgia as part of their clinical picture.  
Answer: D: Influenza ✅  

(498 tokens)
